category_sources: source_facts.description says high-performance HTTP accelerator; official Varnish docs describe Varnish Cache as an HTTP accelerator and caching reverse proxy.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is varnish; official website and docs use Varnish Cache as the product name.
docs_sources: Official varnish.org documentation page links install guide, tutorials, users guide, reference manual, and security information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/varnish/varnish, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list Varnish command-line tools; official docs describe HTTP caching, reverse proxy use, VCL, logging, metrics, and reference tools.
